is the merchandise information.

It features a new illustration of Shiki-chan in her Lillian outfit, from her solo song on the 3rd album Aspire, which was first performed at the 7th Live.
Pre-orders are open until 11:59 PM today, Tuesday, March 31st, the day of this Lieradi broadcast.

Next is an announcement from the Love Live! Series Official Card Game.
On Saturday, May 23rd and Sunday, May 24th, at TFT Hall 1000
and TFT Hall 500, we will be holding the Loveca Fan Meeting.
We'll have early sales of the Love Live! Superstar!! Cheer Up! Start Deck and the Royal Holiday Booster Pack, which officially release on May 30th.
We'll also have events and exhibits for those who haven't played Loveca yet, so please come visit us.
Latest info will be posted on the Loveca official website and X, so keep an eye out.
Now for appearance information.
Starting April 1st, Liella no Tutorial Season 2 will begin on Nippon TV.
Time Machine 3-go will continue as the program MCs from Season 1.
Catch-up streaming will be available on TVer and Nittele Tada after the terrestrial broadcast.
Don't forget to check it out.
To celebrate the show, the Love Live! Superstar!! Liella no Tutorial 2026 live event will be held at LaLa Arena TOKYO-BAY on August 1st and 2nd.
The official second lottery for tickets is currently open on Ticket Pia until 11:59 PM on Sunday, April 5th.
Be sure to check this out as well.
For details on all the info we shared today, please check the Love Live! Superstar!! Liella! official X
and the Love Live! Superstar!! official website.
